labels.description: MinIO object storage is fundamentally different. Designed for performance and the S3 API, it is 100% open-source. MinIO is ideal for large, private cloud environments with stringent security requirements and delivers mission-critical availability across a diverse range of workloads.
labels.io.k8s.description: Very small image which doesn't install the package manager.
labels.io.k8s.display-name: Red Hat Universal Base Image 9 Micro
labels.name: MinIO
labels.summary: MinIO is a High Performance Object Storage, API compatible with Amazon S3 cloud storage service.
